rulings.Case Title: THE BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON FKA AS INDENTURED VS. NOEMI LYKKEBERG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 8, line 1. DEFENDANT JAKE PAVLOVSKY's HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DIERDRE CHIN VS. KEVIN MOHANNA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 8, line 2. DEFENDANT KEVIN MOHANNA and VIVIEN MOHANNA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff does not allege facts that show she has standing to sue. Plaintiff is granted leave to amend, if she can do so in good faith, to allege she has a legal interest in the property or she has standing to sue pursuant to a written agreement. The demurrer is overruled as to all other grounds. The cure or quit notice adequately describes the alleged breaches and how to cure them and the remaining grounds raise issues of fact. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CABRILLO PROPERTIES VS. ANDRE DEFIGUEIREDO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 8, line 3. DEFENDANT ANDRE DEFIGUEIREDO and PHI NGUYEN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Overruled. The Complaint alleges that the Notice to Cure or Quit was served on July 4, 2013 and the violation was not cured by July 8, 2013. This complies with statutory requirements. Also, the Notice sufficiently alleged the lease violation and how to cure it. Additionally, counsel for moving party is reminded to comply with Local Rule 2.6C and provide the Court with a courtesy copy of the operative pleading. Failure to do so in the future may result in having the motion taken off calendar. = (501/REQ)
